title: ageratina intercostulata
intro: Ageratina intercostulata, also known as Mexican mint plant, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family native to Mexico and Central America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ageratina intercostulata include relief from digestive issues, such as nausea and diarrhea, as well as relief from respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of Ageratina intercostulata can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
